Their grueling battle lasted an incredible 5 hours and 12 minutes, stretching to 112 games. González, at 41 years old, proved that age was just a number as he emerged victorious against the 25-year-old Pasarell. This marathon match showcased the players' incredible stamina and determination.

bonus_fact: Callisto is the third-largest moon in our solar system!

activity_answer: NBA Sixth Man of the Year
follow_up_question: Can you name the team Dell Curry set the all-time points record for?

title: Toto's Keyboard Wizard Born
story: Fingers dancing across the keys, David Paich brought magic to rock music. Born in Los Angeles in 1954, he grew up to be the keyboardist for Toto. Paich co-wrote their biggest hits 'Rosanna' and 'Africa'. His talent helped shape the sound of 1980s rock. On June 25, fans celebrate the birthday of this musical genius.
activity_question: What famous band did David Paich play keyboards for?
bonus_fact: David Paich's father was a famous jazz musician and composer.

title: Kiwi Rock Star's Musical Journey Begins
story: A musical legend was born in Te Awamutu, New Zealand. Tim Finn, destined to become a rock star, entered the world in 1952. His talent would lead him to play guitar, sing, write songs, and tickle the ivories. Finn's journey through music included hits with bands Split Enz and Crowded House. He even composed for theatre and film. June 25 marked the start of a melodious adventure!
activity_question: What instrument did Tim Finn play besides guitar and keyboard?
bonus_fact: Te Awamutu means 'The River's End' in Maori.

title: Soul Singer Eddie Floyd's Musical Journey
story: Eddie Floyd's soulful voice first echoed through Montgomery, Alabama, where he was born in 1937. His musical journey led him to join The Falcons, a pioneering R&B group, in 1957. But it was on June 25, years later, that Floyd truly made his mark with the release of his iconic solo hit 'Knock on Wood'.
activity_question: What was the name of Eddie Floyd's famous solo hit?
bonus_fact: Eddie Floyd was also a talented songwriter, penning hits for other artists like Wilson Pickett.

title: Dy-no-mite! A Comedy Star Is Born
story: Laughter echoed through The Bronx as Jimmie Walker entered the world in 1947. Born on June 25, this future comedy sensation would grow up to make millions giggle. Walker's most famous role? The lovable JJ on the hit TV show 'Good Times', where his catchphrase 'Dy-no-mite!' became a national sensation.
activity_question: What was Jimmie Walker's famous catchphrase on 'Good Times'?
bonus_fact: Jimmie Walker started his career as a stand-up comedian before becoming a TV star.
